arts.ttl: Liverpool in talks to snatch signing from Manchester United’s clutches despite claims elsewhere
arts.sum: Liverpool are in talks to sign Geovany Quenda from Sporting Club de Portugal and potentially snatch him from Manchester United’s clutches. That’s according to Record, who say Liverpool are in the mix for the highly rated youngster after reports yesterday that Manchester United had already wrapped up a deal for him.
